expected_subtasks.title: Define dark mode color palette
expected_subtasks.description: Create dark mode variants for all colors

expected_subtasks.title: Update Tailwind CSS configuration
expected_subtasks.description: Add dark mode theme to Tailwind config

expected_subtasks.title: Update all components for dark mode

notes: Dark mode within existing Tailwind CSS design system.
